name: /wtft
tagline: Where The F***ing Tokens?! (WTFT) - Cost Auditing Utility
description: Parses and classifies session token consumption and associated monetary cost into Spec, Code, and Other work types.

usage.desc: Group cost data into 6-minute, 1-hour, 1-day, or 1-week bins (default: 1h).
Limit the number of interval bars displayed (default: 10).

examples.desc: Analyze session cost breakdown binned by 1-hour intervals (shows up to 10 intervals).
Granularly audit recent token usage binned by 6-minute intervals.
Show daily cost breakdown for the last 30 days.
